name: Austin Park Pavilion
description: Come play pickleball at Austin Park Pavilion in Skaneateles, NY! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

description: 1 main court, faint lines on other 2.   Must bring your own net.   Hours of play- after 3 pm school days & weekends

name: Ellis Field Pickleball Courts
description: Ellis Field Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in East Syracuse, NY. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Reservations are not available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Erie Canal Pickleball Center
description: Erie Canal Pickleball Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Syracuse, NY. There are 9 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, food, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, lights, wheelchair accessibility, adaptive programming, locker rooms, water, and youth programming. A one-time fee is required to play.
